mdtools.success_summary: The mdtools run completed the subsection relocation with dual-scorer agreement.

hybrid.failure_summary: The hybrid run moved `### Customer Impact` under `## Communications`, but dropped sibling subsection `### Initial Containment`, causing heading-tree, block-order, and block-text mismatches.

unix.failure_summary: The unix run reached the 30-turn cap after corrupting the fenced ticket-template excerpt: the extracted range missed the closing fence, left `Paste the short customer-facing summary here.` in the source location, and merged `### Status Page Update` into the code block.

gap.rejection_reason: The candidate is realistic and mdtools-only passed, but hybrid and unix both failed, so there is no positive hybrid-minus-unix headline gap to promote.

notes: This candidate reproduces the mdtools-only win shape seen in several rejected steady-state candidates: the standalone tool path succeeded while hybrid over-deleted nearby structure.
The unix trace shows a boundary-selection failure around fenced-code closure rather than pure shell quoting; it repeatedly tried to assemble a line-range solution but missed the closing delimiter.
